content: Per-file pre-commit checks (regression diff, image-reuse block) must SKIP during merge/rebase/cherry-pick — detected via .git/MERGE_HEAD, .git/rebase-merge, .git/rebase-apply, .git/CHERRY_PICK_HEAD. During a merge the staged set contains everything upstream already shipped, and per-file checks re-flag pre-existing failures as if the merge introduced them (observed: image-reuse hook blocked a clean main merge because main already contained known Liberty/Radiance FOM duplicates). CI is the right place to verify cross-branch state; the hook stays active for normal commits. Implementation: InTheWake .githooks/pre-commit top guard.
